title: drynaria rigidula f. cristata
intro: Drynaria rigidula f. cristata, also known as the Chinese tuckahoe or tuckahoe fern, is a type of medicinal plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Drynaria rigidula f. cristata include improving liver function, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis, as well as possessing potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and processed into capsules or tablets for easy consumption.
